no: Optional music pack for BG1 NPC Project banters. All 6 options are mutually exclusive (pick one). Full versions have longer tracks. cn:0 = all audio (regular+romance), cn:1 = regular only, cn:2 = romance only. cn:3-5 are short versions of the same.

dependencies.reason: Music pack for BG1 NPC Project

sum: As we were unable to get the original character voice actors to voice all the new lines, we instead sought out music appropriate to each NPC to be played whenever they initiate banter. This musical package is a separate, optional package.

co.scn: The BG1 NPC Project Music Pack
co.no: All BG1 NPC Project audio (regular + romance).
